summary: Good audience recording captures a nice hall vibe with clear Bob Weir on Let It Grow > Supplication.
review: The tape is an audience (aud) source that sounds good and lets the listener hear Bob clearly during the Let It Grow > Supplication sequence. While the reviewer doesn’t comment much on the overall musical performance, they note the hall’s pleasant atmosphere and give the show a solid rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it praises the recording quality (good audience source) and mentions a clear moment for Bob, but offers little detail on overall performance, leading to a moderate‑high rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough to hear Bob on Let It Grow > Supplication; generally good sounding for an audience tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing.

band_member_comments.Bob: Reviewer notes you can clearly hear Bob during Let It Grow > Supplication.
